zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wadham Jr於1584年出生在英國英格蘭戴文時，他的父親John Wadhams29歲，母親Mrs. John Wadhams26歲。他於1610年之前與Clara在英國英格蘭多瑟特凱黑斯東 列維斯頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世在英國薩默塞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wadham Jr于1584年出生在英国英格兰戴文时，他的父亲John Wadhams29岁，母亲Mrs. John Wadhams26岁。他于1610年之前与Clara在英国英格兰多瑟特凱黑斯東 列維斯頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世在英国薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Wadham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon).

variants.name: Waddams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wadhams
meanings: English: variant of Wadham, with post-medieval excrescent -s, a habitational name from Wadham in Knowstone (Devon). The placename derives from the Old English personal name Wada or Old English wād ‘woad’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’. Wadham College, Oxford, was founded in 1610 by Dorothy Wadham, widow of Nicholas Wadham (died 1609), a wealthy Somerset landowner.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When John Wadham Jr was born in 1584, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Wadhams, was 29 and his mother, Mrs. John Wadhams, was 26. He married Clara before 1610, in Catherston Leweston, Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died in Somerset, England.

Il a épousé Clara avant 1610, à Catherston Leweston, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé à Somerset, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wadham Jrが1584年にイギリスイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父John Wadhamsは29歳，母Mrs. John Wadhamsは26歳であった。1610年以前にイギリスイギリスドールセトカスエルストン ルエストンでClaraと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスソメルセトで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wadham Jr(이)가 1584년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Wadhams(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John Wadhams(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1610년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 캐더스턴 루스턴에서 Clara(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 서머세트에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wadham Jr родился в 1584 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Wadhams было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Wadhams, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Clara перед 1610 г. в местности кэтирстон львестон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер в местности сомирсет, Англия.
